title: No recipients defined in Send Email node
symptom: The Send Email node fails with the error 'No recipients defined' when trying to send an email. This indicates that the recipient fields are not populated correctly.
applies_when: AI Agent output is expected to provide recipient addresses
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The Send Email node requires valid recipient addresses to be defined in the input data. If the AI Agent output does not correctly reference the email address fields, the node will not find any recipients and throw this error.
fix_steps: Check the output structure of the AI Agent to ensure it contains the email address
Modify the expression in the Send Email node to correctly reference the email address, e.g., change `$json['email address']` to `$json.output['email address']`
Save the workflow and test the Send Email node again
agent_instruction: Ensure the email address is correctly referenced from the AI Agent output in the Send Email node.
